name: trmm-vscode
description: Sync Tactical RMM scripts between API and VS Code. Pull, push, test on agents, CLI.

commands.title: TRMM: Pull All Scripts from API
commands.description: Download all scripts and snippets from the API

commands.title: TRMM: Push All Changes to API
commands.description: Upload changed local scripts to the API

commands.title: TRMM: Push Current File to API
commands.description: Upload the currently open script to the API

commands.title: TRMM: Full Sync (Pull + Push)
commands.description: Pull all scripts from API then push local changes

commands.title: TRMM: Test Script on Agent
commands.description: Run the currently open script on a selected agent

commands.title: TRMM: Create New Script
commands.description: Create a new script file with TRMM metadata stub

commands.title: TRMM: Edit Script Metadata
commands.description: Edit metadata fields of the current script via quick-pick

commands.title: TRMM: Open Sync Folder
commands.description: Add the configured sync folder to the current workspace

commands.title: TRMM: Refresh Agent Cache
commands.description: Reload the cached list of agents from the API

commands.title: TRMM: Import Scripts from Git Repo
commands.description: Import script files from any git repository, org-namespaced

commands.title: TRMM: Open Script Editor
commands.description: Open the TRMM script editor side panel

commands.title: TRMM: Setup Wizard
commands.description: Guided setup for API URL, key, sync folder, and preferences

commands.title: TRMM: Debug Auth
commands.description: Show API authentication details in the output panel

trmm.apiKey.description: API key sent as X-API-KEY header

trmm.syncFolder.description: Local folder path for script sync (scripts/ and snippets/ subdirs will be created)

trmm.autoPush.description: Auto-push file to API on save

trmm.paranoidMode.description: Confirmation threshold for API mutations: 0=off, 1=confirm every file, 2=warn from 2nd file, 3=warn from 3rd, etc.

trmm.conflictStrategy.description: When both local and API changed: 'ask' prompts, 'local' overwrites API, 'api' overwrites local

trmm.defaultShell.description: Default shell type for new scripts

trmm.enableScripts.description: Enable script and snippet sync (pull/push scripts/)

trmm.enablePull.description: Allow pulling from API (if false, pull commands skip entirely)

trmm.enablePush.description: Allow pushing to API (if false, push commands skip entirely)

trmm.enableGitHistory.description: Store git history as a script on the API, enabling full history sync between machines (experimental)

trmm.staleStrategy.description: When a script changed on API since last pull: 'skip' warns and skips, 'overwrite' pushes local version

trmm.stripMetadata.description: Strip metadata block from script content before uploading to the API

trmm.verboseLogging.description: Enable detailed debug logging to the TRMM Sync output channel

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run typecheck
